name: Micks Picks Post-Result Adjustment Pack
trigger_result: June 8 card: official straights 2-2, WNBA 2-0, MLB totals 0-2, Pick of the Day won.
core_lesson: Do not let model/projection edge alone push volatile MLB totals onto the official card when park, weather, altitude, bullpen or late-inning volatility create blow-up risk.

mlb_totals.rule: Any full-game MLB total in extreme run environment must be capped at B-/watchlist unless park/weather model, umpire, starters, bullpen, and market all agree.
extreme_run_environment_flags: Las Vegas Ballpark / minor league park / neutral site with PCL-style scoring
Heat or altitude materially boosting carry
Homer-prone starter or low ground-ball profile
Line moving toward Over despite Under projection
mlb_totals.new_grade_cap: B-/Watchlist unless at least 4 run-suppression confirmations exist
required_under_confirmations: Both starters confirmed and project for real length
Market not strongly moving against the Under
Lineup strength does not add major power/contact risk

mlb_sides.rule: When totals are volatile, prefer side/first-5/team-total angles over full-game Under if side has bullpen/start-pitching/market support.
mlb_sides.impact: Brewers ML should have been considered ahead of Brewers/Athletics Under 11 once Vegas scoring risk was identified.

wnba.rule: WNBA model-gap plays with line cushion, home/road fit, and role/injury confirmation can be upgraded more aggressively.
wnba.upgrade_path: B to B+ when projection gap is 4+ points and no major injury contradiction exists. A only if projection gap is 5+ points plus market/line movement supports the side.

props.rule: Role-stable props and hitter HRR/TB props with confirmed lineup, plus-money price, and pitcher-fade path can outrank volatile game totals.
props.upgrade_path: Strong props can be official even when main side/total card is full; however max 3 official props remains.

parlays.rule: No parlay leg may rely on the same fragile full-game MLB total profile that is being capped by volatility rules.
parlays.impact: If Yankees/Guardians Under is top official but not A/B+, do not pair it with Pick of the Day unless it has low volatility.

new_output_requirements: For every official MLB total, include Park/Weather Risk.
For every official MLB Under, include Blow-Up Risk rating: Low / Medium / High.
For every B+ or A candidate, include A-Grade Gate Result.
If a play is capped below B because of volatility, explain the cap.

automatic_downgrade_rules.condition: MLB total >= 10.5 and played in known hitter-friendly/altitude/minor-league park
automatic_downgrade_rules.action: Cap at B- unless 4+ run-suppression confirmations exist.

automatic_downgrade_rules.condition: Under projection edge exists but weather/park strongly favors offense
automatic_downgrade_rules.action: Downgrade one full grade or move to watchlist.

automatic_downgrade_rules.condition: One trusted source attacks the same starter while another source backs pitcher K/Under angle
automatic_downgrade_rules.action: Cap player K props and related Unders at watchlist/B- until conflict resolved.

automatic_downgrade_rules.condition: Pick relies on bullpen holding a full-game Under but one or both bullpens are below average/fatigued
automatic_downgrade_rules.action: Move from full-game Under to first-5 or pass.

positive_upgrade_rules.condition: WNBA spread has 4+ point model gap, current line inside cutoff, and injury/rotation confirmation
WNBA spread has 5+ point model gap, market not moving against it, and matchup supports cover script
Prop has confirmed role/lineup, plus price, weak opponent matchup, and independent projection edge
positive_upgrade_rules.action: Eligible for B+ or A-candidate queue depending on edge size.

positive_upgrade_rules.condition: MLB side has starter, bullpen, lineup, market/splits, and system support with no major contradiction
positive_upgrade_rules.action: Can outrank volatile totals on official card.

daily_card_selection_changes: Before finalizing card, rank plays by risk-adjusted edge, not projection edge alone.
At least one A-candidate search must be run in props/first-5/team-total markets.
If two official plays are from MLB totals, require one to be low-volatility or replace with side/prop.
Do not include a high-volatility total in a parlay.
Pick of the Day should prefer WNBA/NBA role or spread edges over volatile MLB totals when both grade similarly.

worked: Mystics +5.5 as Pick of the Day won and was the right style: model gap plus line cushion.
Liberty/Sun Over won; WNBA model total gap was clean.
Brunson role prop won; stable usage worked.
failed: Yankees/Guardians Under 8 lost because full-game total variance was underestimated.
Brewers/Athletics Under 11 lost badly because Vegas Ballpark/run environment risk should have capped the play harder.
Parlay used a fragile MLB total leg.
lesson_from_june_8.framework_change: Prioritize risk-adjusted certainty over raw projection gap, especially on MLB totals.
